Overview
Top 10 opportunities
These ten industries rank highest on a combined score of financial attractiveness (profit margin, revenue per employee, few competitors, small teams) and AI viability (cognitive work share, digital gap, market accessibility). They represent the sweet spot: economically proven industries where an AI-first entrant has real headroom. Each industry was evaluated by Claude Sonnet 4.5 across three dimensions calibrated against domain-expert scores — click any card for the full reasoning.
